name: PatientSexOrientation
title: Patient Sexual Orientation
description:
This value set includes supported sexual orientation configured in aria. 
The list of configured sexual orientation are available under ValueSet 'aria-patient-sexorientation'. 
All values can be accessed using  $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-sexorientation
